_fixture_meta.purpose: Simulates a Vapi webhook payload with an unrecognised message type.
use_cases: Verify the backend handles unknown event types gracefully (no 500)
Check that a structured error or rejection is returned
Useful for regression-testing the webhook router's default/fallback branch
factory_delta: message.type 'conversation-update' — not produced by any factory; represents a real Vapi event type our backend may not yet handle
message.conversation — field not present in any factory payload

conversation.message: Hello! How can I help you today?
